rationale: The cited paper appears only once in the methods section, where the authors note that their chosen adstock carryover parameter (0.50) is close to a meta-analytic benchmark (0.52) from Kohler et al. (2017). This functions as a brief calibration or plausibility reference for an advertising control specification. It does not materially shape the paper's core theory, hypotheses, or contribution about brand equity and visual design.
